visual_description: Two men in dark suits walk through a ruined stone archway, each holding an arm of a third person dressed in dark clothing. They move forward through scattered rubble, guided by the warm glow emanating from the interior of the arch. The scene is dim, with the figures silhouetted against the bright opening.
